creator: koue@chaosophia.net
text:
Created attachment 152009
libosmocore-0.8.0 patch

Update devel/libosmocore to version 0.8.0

devel/libosmo-abis and devel/libosmo-sccp are dependent of devel/libosmocore. They are tested and everything looks good.
